pages.title: About Alan Mak | Alan Mak
pages.meta_description: Alan was first elected on 7 May 2015 as our local MP. He was re-elected in June 2017, and re-elected again on 12th December 2019 with the biggest ever majority and the highest Conservative vote share in the constituency's history.
headings: h2: Working hard and getting things done for local residents — All Year Round
h2: Alan in Westminster: Our local champion
h2: Real Life Experience: Professional, Business & Charitable
h3: Alan Mak Member of Parliament for the Havant Constituency
pages.text_excerpt: About Alan Mak | Alan Mak Skip to main content Main navigation Home About Alan Residents' Survey News Contact About Alan Mak Tweet Alan was first elected on 7 May 2015 as our local MP. He was re-elected in June 2017, and re-elected again in December 2019 with the biggest ever majority and the highest vote share in the Havant Constituency's history. Alan was then re-elected in July 2024. The video above is from Alan's 2024 re-election campaign. In addition to his role as our local MP, Alan is also currently serving as Shadow Secretary of State for Science, Innovation & Technology in the Shadow Cabinet . Alan won the Best New Conservative MP Award 2017/18 and the Conservative MP of the Year Award 2021/22 at the cross-party MP of the Year Awards hosted by the Speaker of the House of Commons in recognition of his hard work for residents all year round. Alan continues to work hard and get things done for residents all year round. Stay in touch with Alan’s work – and share your views with Alan: ✅ Share your views with Alan: www.AlanMak.org/Survey ✅ Support Alan’s local campaigning: www.AlanMak.org.uk/Volunteer Follow Alan on social media: ✅ Facebook: FB.com/AlanMakHavant ✅ Instagram: @AlanMakHavant ✅ X/Twitter: @AlanMakMP Working hard and getting things done for local residents — All Year Round Alan's vision is for everyone across the Havant Constituency to have a secure and prosperous future. His local priorities include: a strong local economy , successful local schools and supporting our NHS . Since he was first elected in May 2015, Alan has been actively meeting local residents, understanding local issues, and supporting local businesses, schools and community groups in every part of our diverse constituency . Since 2015 Alan has launched a range of local community events and initiatives to help local residents, including organising: 9 annual Jobs, Apprenticeships and Careers Fairs - helping local people find work, change career or get advice about employment; 9 annual Community Information Fairs - showcasing local community groups, charities, voluntary bodies and sports clubs; 9 annual Small Business & Community Awards - to support our local independent shops, small businesses and high streets; and 3 annual Health & Wellbeing Fairs - to provide help and advice in relation to mental and physical health. Locally, Alan holds a range of unpaid, honorary ex-officio roles in the community, including with Havant Rugby Football Club (as a Vice President), Havant & Waterlooville Football Club (as Vice President); the Royal British Legion's Havant Branch (as Vice President); the Havant Borough Sports Association (as Honorary President); and the Manor Trust, Bedhampton (as Honorary Vice President). Alan in Westminster: Our local champion Alan’s main policy interests are the economy & business, including Britain's leadership of the Fourth Industrial Revolution ; education & skills ; and keeping Britain safe & successful in a changing world (focusing on defence & foreign policy, and Britain’s international economic competitiveness). These are all relevant across the Havant Constituency and reflect the priorities of local residents. Alan has spoken regularly in the Chamber of the House of Commons on issues of local importance (such as local economic regeneration) and national significance (such as UK economic policy and Britain's role in the world); and plays an active role in the legislative process (for example by scrutinising and voting on legislation). He has served in a number of Government Minister and "payroll" positions under 4 Conservative Prime Ministers, including the following roles: Parliamentary Private Secretary at the Ministry of Justice Parliamentary Private Secretary at the Department for Business, Energy and Industrial Strategy Parliamentary Private Secretary at the Ministry of Housing, Communities and Local Government (MHCLG); Vice Chairman of the Conservative Party Co-Chairman of the Conservative Party Policy Board Lord

pages.title: Residents' Survey 2026 - Share your views with Alan | Alan Mak
pages.h1: Residents' Survey 2026 - Share your views with Alan
pages.meta_description: As your active, visible and community-focused local champion, I engage regularly with residents and attend community events throughout the year.I have met and corresponded with thousands of residents and I am really keen to hear about what matters to you and your family.
headings: h3: Alan Mak Member of Parliament for the Havant Constituency
pages.text_excerpt: Residents' Survey 2026 - Share your views with Alan | Alan Mak Skip to main content Main navigation Home About Alan Residents' Survey News Contact Residents' Survey 2026 - Share your views with Alan Tweet As your active, visible and community-focused local champion, I engage regularly with residents and attend community events throughout the year. I have met and corresponded with thousands of residents and I am really keen to hear about what matters to you and your family. I run regular surveys that help inform my work as your local champion. I have opened a survey in relation to each area of the Havant Constituency. Please click the relevant link below to complete a survey to share your views with me: OurPlan Survey - Spring 2026 Bedhampton residents' survey Emsworth residents' survey Havant/St. Faith's residents' survey (includes Havant town centre, Langstone, Denvilles and Warblington) Hayling Island residents' survey Leigh Park residents' survey Purbrook residents' survey Stakes residents' survey Alan Mak Member of Parliament for the Havant Constituency Footer About RSS Accessibility Cookies Privacy About Alan Mak Alan's E-Mail Newsletter - Sign Up!
